parameters.query:
SELECT
  doc.id AS doctor_id,
  doc.name AS doctor_name,
  COALESCE(i.currency, 'UYU') AS currency,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sc.paciente_id) AS num_pacientes,
  COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) AS num_facturas,
  COALESCE(SUM(i.total), 0) AS total_facturado,
  COALESCE(SUM(i.paid_amount), 0) AS total_cobrado,
  COALESCE(AVG(i.total), 0) AS ticket_promedio
FROM sesiones_clinicas sc
JOIN users doc ON doc.id = sc.doctor_id
LEFT JOIN quotes q ON q.id = sc.quote_id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.quote_id = q.id
LEFT JOIN invoices i ON i.order_id = o.id AND i.is_sales = true
  AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR i.currency = $3::varchar)
WHERE sc.fecha_sesion::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ($4::uuid IS NULL OR sc.doctor_id = $4::uuid)
GROUP BY doc.id, doc.name, i.currency
ORDER BY total_facturado DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT
  COALESCE(sc_cat.name, ts.descripcion_tratamiento) AS service_name,
  COALESCE(sc_cat.category, 'Sin categoría') AS category,
  COUNT(ts.id) AS cantidad,
  COALESCE(SUM(oi.unit_price), 0) AS total_facturado,
  COALESCE(AVG(oi.unit_price), 0) AS precio_promedio
FROM tratamientos_sesion ts
JOIN sesiones_clinicas sc ON sc.id = ts.sesion_id
LEFT JOIN service_catalog sc_cat ON sc_cat.name ILIKE ts.descripcion_tratamiento
LEFT JOIN quotes q ON q.id = sc.quote_id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.quote_id = q.id
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id AND oi.service_id = sc_cat.id
WHERE sc.fecha_sesion::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ($3::uuid IS NULL OR sc.doctor_id = $3::uuid)
GROUP BY service_name, category
ORDER BY cantidad DESC

SELECT
  TO_CHAR(sc.fecha_sesion, 'YYYY-MM') AS mes,
  EXTRACT(MONTH FROM sc.fecha_sesion)::integer AS mes_num,
  doc.name AS doctor_name,
  COALESCE(i.currency, 'UYU') AS currency,
  COALESCE(SUM(i.total), 0) AS total_facturado,
  COALESCE(SUM(i.paid_amount), 0) AS total_cobrado,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sc.paciente_id) AS num_pacientes
FROM sesiones_clinicas sc
JOIN users doc ON doc.id = sc.doctor_id
LEFT JOIN quotes q ON q.id = sc.quote_id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.quote_id = q.id
LEFT JOIN invoices i ON i.order_id = o.id AND i.is_sales = true
  AND ($3::varchar IS NULL OR i.currency = $3::varchar)
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM sc.fecha_sesion) = $1::integer
  AND ($2::uuid IS NULL OR sc.doctor_id = $2::uuid)
GROUP BY mes, mes_num, doc.name, i.currency
ORDER BY mes_num, doc.name

SELECT
  doc.id AS doctor_id,
  doc.name AS doctor_name,
  COALESCE(i.currency, 'UYU') AS currency,
  COALESCE(SUM(i.total), 0) AS total_facturado,
  COALESCE(SUM(i.paid_amount), 0) AS total_cobrado,
  COALESCE(pc.productividad_porcentaje, 0) AS porcentaje
FROM sesiones_clinicas sc
JOIN users doc ON doc.id = sc.doctor_id
LEFT JOIN payroll_employees pe ON pe.user_id = doc.id
LEFT JOIN payroll_employments pem ON pem.employee_id = pe.id AND pem.is_active = true
LEFT JOIN payroll_categories pc ON pc.id = pem.category_id
LEFT JOIN quotes q ON q.id = sc.quote_id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.quote_id = q.id
LEFT JOIN invoices i ON i.order_id = o.id AND i.is_sales = true
WHERE sc.fecha_sesion::date BETWEEN $1::date AND $2::date
  AND ($3::uuid IS NULL OR sc.doctor_id = $3::uuid)
GROUP BY doc.id, doc.name, i.currency, pc.productividad_porcentaje
ORDER BY total_facturado DESC NULLS LAST
